content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Chunga-Changa". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1181/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n integers representing the array.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the maximum number of elements that can be removed from the array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

code.Python3:
n, k = map(int, input().split())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
count = sum(1 for i in arr if i <= k)
print(n - count)
